Dear Maeve,

Thank you for submitting your claim for neck strain treatment on 11 May 2025 at City Sports Injury Clinic. We appreciate your prompt attention to this matter.

To process your claim, please follow the steps outlined in our 'How to Claim' knowledge base article. You can submit your claim through the Laya App or your Member Area at any time, day or night. This process is simple and convenient, allowing you to take a photo of your receipt using your phone and submit it through the App.
